backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the clothing store backend with Product, CartItem, and Order types, persistent maps for products/carts/orders, and an initializeStore function that seeds 12 sample products across four categories.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: the /admin Admin Panel page (with product CRUD via React Query mutations) and the Admin nav link added to Header.tsx, each mapped to test IDs and relevant files.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of short summaries for every frontend source file, describing the purpose and key design details of each component, page, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the warm neutral color palette in both light and dark modes, including background, foreground, accent, border, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'DHIMAYU STUDIO' and mounts the React app via the /src/main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, catalog, product detail, cart, checkout, order confirmation, and admin) nested under a shared Layout root route.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Three-column footer displaying the studio logo, Collections and Studio link lists, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution badge with a Heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with a centered logo/brand name, desktop category nav buttons, an Admin link, a cart icon with item count badge, and a collapsible mobile navigation menu.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout shell that composes Header, a flex-growing Outlet for page content, and Footer into a full-height column layout.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a product card with image placeholder, hover quick-add button, and product info (name, sizes, price), linking to the product detail page.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, AuthClient management, and a React provider/hook for accessing identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines all React Query hooks for the app, including product CRUD mutations, cart operations, and order queries, each delegating to the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind CSS base styles with a warm neutral (cream/terracotta) design token palette for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions and constants including class merging (cn), price formatting, and mappings between Category enum values, display labels, slugs, and image paths.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin page for managing products, providing a table view with add/edit/delete dialogs backed by the product mutation hooks and form validation.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Renders the shopping cart page with a list of cart items, quantity controls (increment/decrement/remove), and an order summary with subtotal and checkout navigation.
frontend/src/pages/Catalog.tsx: Displays a product catalog page filtered by category, with category tab navigation, loading skeletons, error/empty states, and a responsive product grid.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Provides a checkout form for entering delivery details (name and address), displays an order summary with line items and subtotal, and handles order placement with validation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Renders the homepage with a hero banner, brand statement section, and a grid of category cards that navigate to the catalog; also auto-initializes the store if no products exist.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Shows a post-order confirmation screen with a success icon, order reference ID from URL search params, and links to return home or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Displays a single product's details including name, price, stock status, size selector, and an add-to-cart button with loading and success feedback states.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Jost), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations, while enabling dark mode and the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 23) for 'Dhimayu Studio', a garments-selling app, listing existing features such as homepage, product catalog, product detail, shopping cart, and checkout pages along with their requirement IDs and architectural notes.
